title: Jealousy
writer: Louis Verneuil, Eugene Walter, Garrett Fort
actors: Jeanne Eagels, Fredric March, Halliwell Hobbes
plot: Yvonne, proprietor of a Paris gown shop, marries Pierre, a poor artist, concealing from him an affair she had with Rigaud, an elderly boulevardier who bought the shop for her. Encountering financial difficulties, Yvonne goes to Ri...
